title: ‘US will never give up the Moon again’: Nasa unveils lunar base roadmap, nuclear Mars mission
summary_full: NASA unveiled ambitious initiatives to accelerate its return to the Moon, aiming for a lunar landing by the end of President Trump's term and establishing a long-term presence. The agency's updated Moon strategy focuses on a phased approach to building a lunar base, incorporating commercial and international partnerships to support frequent crewed missions and sustained human operations.
